channel.title: Message-Queue on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Message-Queue on Arrans github.io

item.title: poundifdef/SmoothMQ
item.description: A drop-in replacement for SQS designed for great developer experience and efficiency.

item.title: sandglass/sandglass
item.description: Sandglass is a distributed, horizontally scalable, persistent, time sorted message queue.
